title: UK’s Consumer Price Index Report
subtitle:
Special Profitability
on EUR/GBP
text-1: The upcoming  Consumer Price Index Report is of particular importance, as it will be the first one since the start of the “divorce” proceedings between the UK and the EU.
text-2: The question on everyone’s mind is “Has Brexit already started to affect the buying habits of the Brits?”. If the figures revealed point to a “Yes”, the value of Pound could easily go down.
note-title: Looking to trade the UK CPI report?
note-text: Read this analytical overview on the IQ Option Blog first!
asterisk: *The amount to be credited to the balance in case of successful investment. The offer is valid on April 11 from 7:30 to 10:30 GMT.
